title: You are not the hero
description: You are not the main character of the story. You are the sidekick of a hero! It is your job to find out which monster is threatening a small fantasy town and then send the hero into battle with the right tactics and equipment. Can you figure out what you're up against?
reflection: Another four-person team with two programmers and two artists. This time with another programming partner. I learned Godot during this time, which worked pretty well. What I noticed during this was that, because of my lack of experience, I’m not too set in my ways and can be pretty flexible with tools. I can switch roles if necessary and produce a usable outcome without too many difficulties. At the end of the project, I really noticed that I thrive as a generalist.
focus: Trying a new engine and clean code structure
